channel.title: Austin Humphrey — Writing
channel.description: Sports intelligence editorial by Austin Humphrey, builder of Blaze Sports Intel.

item.title: Big 12 Conference Baseball Preview 2026
item.description: A deep dive into every Big 12 program. Conference realignment reshuffled the deck.

item.title: SEC Conference Baseball Preview 2026
item.description: The deepest conference in college baseball just added Texas and Oklahoma.

item.title: Big Ten Conference Baseball Preview 2026
item.description: The Big Ten remade itself as a baseball conference.

item.title: Week 1 Recap: What We Learned
item.description: Opening weekend separated contenders from pretenders.

item.title: Texas Longhorns: Week 1 in Review
item.description: Breaking down the pitching staff evolution and postseason trajectory.
